posts.author: lucky123 (Martina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

I hope you can help me with my request.

We have a board with elements. We have stored these elements as mirror columns in other boards.

We would like to create a booking system. This means that if the element is selected in the mirror column and I assign something to it (and thus block it), it should no longer be selectable for others and thus be displayed as ‘occupied’.

In addition, the value should NOT be changeable for others. (!)
The element should be blocked for the period of my booking. So if I assign or book the element for the period 1 January to 3 January, no one else should be able to edit/change this element.

Think of it like Outlook.

Suppose you set an appointment for Monday for a colleague and he accept it. Then everyone else should be shown that this colleague cannot be booked for any other appointments on this day and is therefore ‘booked’.

How exactly does this work? Is this even possible?

I also had a look at the following tool:

Support

Manage your resources with monday.com

6 min read Guide     What is resource management? Resource management is the process of planning the use of your resources and scheduling out their allocation. Resources can be anything your b...

However, this tool is not really suitable for my requirements. Does anyone here have any other suggestions?

Hello everyone,

I hope you can help me with my request.

We have a board with elements. These elements in turn have a mirror column in the

I hope you can help me out with this! Unfortunately it’s very urgent

Kind regards
Elias
